quote.text: In every walk with nature, one receives far more than he seeks.
quote.author: John Muir

fun_fact.text: Hungarian is one of the few languages in the world where surnames come before first names, a tradition that reflects the culture's emphasis on family heritage. This unique naming order is shared with only a handful of other languages, including Japanese and Korean. It's a beautiful reminder of how deeply family ties are woven into Hungarian identity.

short_read.title: The Secret Lives of Harbor Seals in the Pacific Northwest
short_read.teaser: Harbor seals in the Strait of Juan de Fuca are remarkably intelligent and social creatures with surprising behaviors. Learn about their playful personalities and how they navigate the coastal waters you see every day.

medium_read.title: The Art of Cottage Gardening: A Timeless Tradition
medium_read.teaser: Cottage gardens combine beauty with practicality, mixing flowers, herbs, and vegetables in charming, informal arrangements. Discover the history of this beloved gardening style and tips for creating your own peaceful garden retreat.

long_read.title: Budapest: The Pearl of the Danube
long_read.teaser: This beautiful exploration of Budapest reveals the city's transformation through centuries of triumph and struggle. From its thermal baths to its bridges, discover the heart of Hungarian culture and resilience.

port_angeles.title: Butterfly Season at Hurricane Ridge
port_angeles.description: July is peak butterfly season at Hurricane Ridge, where colorful species like the Western Tiger Swallowtail dance through alpine meadows. The wildflowers are in full bloom right now, creating a magical scene just 17 miles from Port Angeles. It's one of the most beautiful times of year to visit.

puzzle_1.question: A hummingbird's heart beats approximately ___ times per minute during flight.
puzzle_1.correct_response: Wonderful! That tiny heart really races — it's one of nature's most incredible adaptations!
puzzle_1.close_response: You're very close! A hummingbird's heart beats about 1,200 times per minute — truly astonishing!
puzzle_1.wrong_response: It's hard to imagine, but a hummingbird's heart beats about 1,200 times per minute! That's about 20 beats every second.
puzzle_1.learn_more_text: To power their incredibly fast wing beats (up to 80 times per second), hummingbirds need extraordinary metabolism. Their heart rate can even reach 1,260 beats per minute, and they must eat every 10-15 minutes throughout the day.

puzzle_2.question: Which Hungarian word means 'thank you'?
puzzle_2.correct_response: Köszönöm! That's exactly right — a warm word you probably use often!
puzzle_2.wrong_response: The word is 'köszönöm' (KUR-sur-nurm) — such a lovely way to express gratitude in Hungarian!
puzzle_2.learn_more_text: Hungarian is a unique language in Europe, part of the Finno-Ugric family rather than Indo-European. It's known for its musicality and expressive nature, with 18 grammatical cases that allow for incredible precision and poetry.

puzzle_3.question: What is the Olympic Peninsula's temperate rainforest famous for receiving each year?
puzzle_3.correct_response: Exactly right! All that rain creates the magical, moss-covered wonderland of the Hoh and Quinault rainforests — some of the most beautiful places on Earth!
puzzle_3.wrong_response: The peninsula's western valleys receive over 140 inches of rain yearly, creating those enchanting temperate rainforests. It's what makes the mossy, green forests so magical!
puzzle_3.learn_more_text: The Hoh Rainforest is one of the largest temperate rainforests in the United States. The abundant rainfall creates a fairy-tale landscape of massive trees draped in moss, ferns covering every surface, and an ecosystem found nowhere else.
puzzle_3.learn_more_label: Visit the Hoh — Olympic National Park

game.title: Bubble Shooter
game.description: A relaxing bubble puzzle game — aim and pop matching colored bubbles. Easy to pick up, fun to play!
